title: Water Intake Calculator - Daily Hydration Needs
description: Free water intake calculator. Find out how much water you should drink daily based on your weight, activity level, and climate.
keywords: water intake calculator, daily water needs, hydration calculator, how much water to drink, water consumption
intro: Calculate your recommended daily water intake based on your body weight, activity level, and environment.

faq.q: How much water should I drink daily?
faq.a: A general guideline is about 35ml per kg of body weight, adjusted for activity level and climate. This calculator provides a personalized recommendation.

faq.q: Does coffee count toward water intake?
faq.a: Yes, all beverages contribute to hydration, though water is the best choice. Caffeinated drinks have a mild diuretic effect but still provide net hydration.
Common signs include dark yellow urine, thirst, dry mouth, fatigue, dizziness, and headaches.
